aboutUsSection.title: About SZW
aboutUsSection.descriptionWithBlackText: SZW is an IMS certified social enterprise that offers holistic waste management solutions to corporates, governments, international organizations, bulk waste generators and consumers.
aboutUsSection.descriptionWithGreenText: We have been operational for 10 years with a focus around nature, people and technology. Connect with us to know more.
